meta.name: Phone Repair
meta.description: Setup-AI phone repair shop theme with booking
meta.author: Setup-AI

data.title: Display Assembly
data.description: Complete OLED/LCD replacement. Restores True Tone functionality and original touch responsiveness.

data.title: Battery Subsystem
data.description: High-capacity cell replacement. Eliminates unexpected shutdowns and restores peak performance.

data.title: Logic Board
data.description: Micro-soldering and liquid damage recovery. Advanced component-level repair for critical failures.

data.title: Drop Off
data.description: Bring your device to any Revive location. Our concierge team will perform a quick initial assessment and log your device into our secure queue.

data.title: Diagnose
data.description: Specialized technicians perform a comprehensive 40-point inspection to identify the root cause. You receive a detailed report and fixed quote via SMS/Email.

data.title: Repair
data.description: We execute the repair using precision Grade-A components in an ESD-safe environment. Every device is calibrated to factory specifications after assembly.

data.title: Pick Up
data.description: A final QA specialist verifies all functions. You are notified that your device is ready for collection, backed by our 12-month standard warranty.

data.question: What does the Revive Limited Warranty cover?
data.answer: Our warranty covers all parts and labor for 12 months. This includes defects in materials and workmanship for any component replaced by our technicians.

data.question: How long does a standard display repair take?
data.answer: Most display repairs are completed same-day, typically within 1-2 hours of your scheduled appointment.

data.question: Are diagnostic fees refundable if I proceed with repair?
data.answer: Yes. The $49 diagnostic fee is credited toward your repair if you choose to proceed. If you decline the repair, the diagnostic fee is non-refundable.

data.question: Can I track my repair status in real-time?
data.answer: Yes. After drop-off, you receive a link to track your repair through every stage — from diagnostics to quality assurance to ready for pickup.
